response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks direct C++ experience in professional industrial or embedded systems contexts beyond a brief role at National Instruments; there is no evidence of hands-on work with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols critical to the role, and the past 8+ years have been dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not C++ development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source experience with diverse technologies
Strong documentation, teaching, and community contributions (workshops, OSS)
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across platforms (embedded, web, cloud)
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; no demonstrated use of STL or OOP in modern C++ contexts
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 compliance
Lacks demonstrable experience with message brokers, networked multi-threaded C++ systems
